From the gardens
This season, together

Growing toward our goals

Every lesson, taste, pound, and gathering across all One Cool Earth school gardens this year. Each goal is drawn its own way, with a note on why it matters and how we get there.

Out in the community

Three gatherings carry the garden past the school fence. They are not weighed or averaged — they are counted, one at a time, as they happen.

Explore a school

School gardens, one by one

Pick a school to see its progress, program, and the badges its garden has earned.
